question.label: Owning next quarter
question.name: You said 'owning next quarter' feels unclear — what are you expecting to own?
question.description: Drills into her stated uncertainty about next-quarter ownership before progressing.

answer: I have felt a bit stuck doing similar work for months.

assessment.note: Says she has felt stuck doing similar work for months, which signals mild role uncertainty and a growth plateau; growth was also previously untouched.

new_queue.label: Similar work
new_queue.name: Doing similar work for months — what feels too repetitive about it?

new_queue.label: Scope tradeoff
new_queue.name: What would you want to leave off your plate if that next-quarter shape holds?

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: I am not sure what I am owning next quarter yet, and that makes me uneasy.
The launch went well, but this week I feel flatter than I expected.
Mostly cleanup and reviews right now, not much that feels new.
I am proud of the migration plan and how we handled the cutover.
I did mention mentoring before. I still want it, but I stopped pushing.
